description: Generate a publication-quality schematic of the bacterial ThDP biosynthesis pathway (two branches, coupling, activation)
code:
import matplotlib.pyplot as plt
from matplotlib.patches import FancyBboxPatch, FancyArrowPatch
from matplotlib.lines import Line2D

fig, ax = plt.subplots(figsize=(13, 9))
ax.set_xlim(0, 13); ax.set_ylim(0, 9); ax.axis('off')

# colors (colorblind-friendly)
c_pyr = "#4C72B0"   # pyrimidine branch
c_thz = "#55A868"   # thiazole branch
c_sulf= "#C44E52"   # sulfur relay
c_coup= "#8172B3"   # coupling/activation
c_acc = "#CCB974"   # accessory

def box(x, y, w, h, text, color, fs=9, tc="white"):
    ax.add_patch(FancyBboxPatch((x, y), w, h, boxstyle="round,pad=0.02,rounding_size=0.08",
                 linewidth=1.2, edgecolor="black", facecolor=color, alpha=0.92))
    ax.text(x+w/2, y+h/2, text, ha="center", va="center", fontsize=fs, color=tc, wrap=True)

def arrow(x1,y1,x2,y2, color="black", style='-|>', lw=1.6, ls='-'):
    ax.add_patch(FancyArrowPatch((x1,y1),(x2,y2), arrowstyle=style, mutation_scale=14,
                 color=color, lw=lw, linestyle=ls))

ax.text(6.5, 8.7, "Bacterial de novo Thiamine Diphosphate (ThDP) Biosynthesis",
        ha="center", fontsize=14, fontweight="bold")

# ---- Pyrimidine branch (left) ----
ax.text(2.4, 8.15, "PYRIMIDINE BRANCH", ha="center", fontsize=10, fontweight="bold", color=c_pyr)
box(0.7, 7.3, 3.4, 0.7, "AIR\n(5-aminoimidazole ribonucleotide;\nfrom purine pathway)", "#DDE3F0", fs=8, tc="black")
arrow(2.4,7.3, 2.4,6.75, c_pyr)
box(0.9, 6.55, 3.0, 0.2, "", c_pyr, fs=1)  # spacer hidden
ax.text(2.4, 6.5, "ThiC  (radical-SAM, [4Fe-4S])", ha="center", fontsize=8.5, color=c_pyr, fontweight="bold")
arrow(2.4,6.35, 2.4,5.95, c_pyr)
box(0.9, 5.25, 3.0, 0.7, "HMP-P\n(hydroxymethyl-\npyrimidine phosphate)", "#DDE3F0", fs=8, tc="black")
arrow(2.4,5.25, 2.4,4.75, c_pyr)
ax.text(2.4, 4.55, "ThiD  (HMP-P kinase; bifunctional)", ha="center", fontsize=8.5, color=c_pyr, fontweight="bold")
arrow(2.4,4.4, 2.4,4.0, c_pyr)
box(0.9, 3.3, 3.0, 0.7, "HMP-PP\n(HMP diphosphate)", "#DDE3F0", fs=8, tc="black")

# ---- Thiazole branch (right) ----
ax.text(10.0, 8.15, "THIAZOLE BRANCH", ha="center", fontsize=10, fontweight="bold", color=c_thz)
# three inputs
box(7.4, 7.3, 2.0, 0.7, "Pyruvate + G3P", "#E1EFE6", fs=8, tc="black")
ax.text(8.4, 7.05, "Dxs", ha="center", fontsize=8, color=c_thz, fontweight="bold")
box(7.9, 6.35, 1.0, 0.55, "DXP", c_thz, fs=8)

box(9.7, 7.3, 2.9, 0.7, "Glycine (ThiO, FAD; aerobes)\n—or— Tyrosine (ThiH, rad-SAM)", "#E1EFE6", fs=7.5, tc="black")
box(10.6, 6.35, 1.4, 0.55, "dehydro-\nglycine", c_thz, fs=7.5)

# sulfur relay
ax.text(11.9, 5.85, "SULFUR RELAY", ha="center", fontsize=8.5, fontweight="bold", color=c_sulf)
box(10.9, 5.15, 2.0, 0.6, "L-Cys → IscS\n(persulfide)", "#F3DEDE", fs=7.5, tc="black")
arrow(11.9,5.15, 11.9,4.85, c_sulf)
box(10.9, 4.25, 2.0, 0.6, "ThiF (adenylate)\n+ ThiI → ThiS-COSH", "#F3DEDE", fs=7.5, tc="black")

# ThiG convergence
arrow(8.4,6.35, 8.7,4.35, c_thz)
arrow(11.3,6.35, 9.3,4.35, c_thz)
arrow(11.9,4.25, 9.6,4.05, c_sulf)
box(7.9, 3.55, 2.6, 0.7, "ThiG  thiazole synthase\n→ thiazole-P", c_thz, fs=8.5)
arrow(9.2,3.55, 9.2,3.15, c_acc)
box(8.1, 2.55, 2.2, 0.6, "TenI (tautomerase,\naccessory)", c_acc, fs=8, tc="black")

# ---- Coupling ----
arrow(2.4,3.3, 4.7,2.3, c_pyr)      # HMP-PP -> ThiE
arrow(9.2,2.55, 6.9,2.3, c_thz)     # thiazole-P -> ThiE
box(4.7, 1.65, 2.4, 0.7, "ThiE\nthiamine-phosphate synthase", c_coup, fs=8.5)
ax.text(5.9, 1.4, "→ Thiamine monophosphate (TMP)", ha="center", fontsize=8, color="black")
arrow(5.9,1.35, 5.9,0.95, c_coup)
box(4.5, 0.25, 2.8, 0.7, "ThiL  (TMP kinase)\n→ THDP  (active cofactor)", c_coup, fs=8.5)

# feedback regulation note
ax.text(0.3, 0.5, "Negative feedback:\nThDP riboswitches", fontsize=8, color="black",
        style="italic", ha="left")
arrow(2.0,0.6, 4.5,0.6, "gray", style='-|>', lw=1.2, ls=(0,(4,3)))

# legend
leg = [Line2D([0],[0], color=c_pyr, lw=6, label="Pyrimidine branch"),
       Line2D([0],[0], color=c_thz, lw=6, label="Thiazole branch"),
       Line2D([0],[0], color=c_sulf, lw=6, label="Sulfur relay"),
       Line2D([0],[0], color=c_coup, lw=6, label="Coupling / activation"),
       Line2D([0],[0], color=c_acc, lw=6, label="Accessory (TenI)")]
ax.legend(handles=leg, loc="lower right", fontsize=8, frameon=True, ncol=1, bbox_to_anchor=(1.0,0.02))

plt.tight_layout()
plt.savefig("thdp_pathway_schematic.png", dpi=150, bbox_inches="tight")
print("Figure saved: thdp_pathway_schematic.png")
